title: Restore the previous TempDirForURL API
body:
It has callers outside of Buildah; so https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/d724f1deba480b615e4ccd0c1affb3daa80ca226 , while simplifying the code at both callers and callees, is problematic.

A better fix might be to define an improved API (in a dedicated, internal, subpackage?), and keep this one as a compatibility wrapper.

#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

#### How to verify it

Diff to 25b64236d53ce48444535115dbece377dbb76a61 .

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

@mtrmac Smoke test failure.  On the off chance you're still about, I'll check later and will merge if you can get it happy.

```
[+0016s] ./tests/tools/build/golangci-lint run --timeout=20m --color=always -j1
[+0155s] �[1mdefine/types.go:379�[22m:28: �[31mwriteFileInRoot - name always receives "Dockerfile"�[0m (unparam)
[+0155s] func writeFileInRoot(root, name string, data []byte, perm os.FileMode) error {
[+0155s]                            �[33m^�[0m
[+0155s] 1 issues:
[+0155s] * unparam: 1
[+0155s] make: *** [Makefile:215: lint] Error 1
```
I've added a nolint to the failing function, fingers crossed.
I've added the call to `writeFileInRoot` in those two lines.
Ugh, just added the no-new-tests label.  I really wish the Smoke test would go through and find all instead of bailing at the first hiccup.
OK I finally understand why the `nolintlint` linter triggers.

@nalind have you seen this error before?  I don't recall seeing it.  It seems to be the same error across the three failing tests I checked.

```
[+0616s] not ok 496 bud with ADD with git repository source escape directory
[+0616s] # (in test file ./bud.bats, line 8198)
[+0616s] #   `git -C ${repodir} commit -m "initial commit"' failed with status 128
[+0616s] # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests
[+0616s] # # [checking for: docker.io/library/alpine]
```

> I propose disabling the test, for today.

https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6876 tracks re-enabling it, for the record.
I continue to be LGTM on this. Just needs a merge.

LGTM
will merge once this one last test finishes.
(merging based on the two prior LGTM)
